name: Grounding
description: Verifies generated claims against retrieved evidence, identifies unsupported or contradicted assertions, and anchors outputs in traceable, cited sources.

evidence.notes: RARR (Gao et al., 2022) -- retrieval and attribution for LLM outputs; +32 points on the AIS attribution benchmark by revising ungrounded claims using retrieved web evidence.

FActScore (Min et al., EMNLP 2023) -- atomic factuality scoring pipeline decomposing generation into claims and verifying each against a retrieval corpus; open-source with reproducible evaluation on biography generation.
